scripts.lint: pnpm --filter api run lint && pnpm --filter web run lint && pnpm --filter worker run lint
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter api run typecheck && pnpm --filter web run typecheck && pnpm --filter worker run typecheck
scripts.test: pnpm --filter api run test && pnpm --filter web run test
scripts.build: pnpm --filter api run build && pnpm --filter web run build && pnpm --filter worker run build
